title: GroundTruthContext
description: Per-task ground-truth annotation for the §F4 RoutingAccuracy metric. Each task has exactly ONE correct target context (singular form), keyed by an agent_role and a context_id that must appear in the workload/family spec.yaml required_contexts[] block.

agent_role.description: Which agent role the task must be dispatched to.

context_id.description: Stable id matching required_contexts[].role in the workload/family spec.yaml. Free-form kebab-case (e.g. slave-linux-server, slave-windows-desktop, sandbox-cloud).

rationale.description: Human-readable justification for why this is the unique correct context. Used by reviewers to audit annotation quality.
